zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Daiville於1205年出生在英國越可爾吉爾本時，他的父親John de Daiville I34歲，母親Maud de Percy38歲。他和Mrs. Robert de Eiville至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1242年5月在英國越可爾阿德林福利特享年37歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Daiville于1205年出生在英国越可爾吉爾本时，他的父亲John de Daiville I34岁，母亲Maud de Percy38岁。他和Mrs. Robert de Eiville至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1242年5月在英国越可爾阿德林福利特享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: Daiville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and English (of Norman or Huguenot origin): habitational name from Anville (Charente), with fused preposition d' ‘from’. This surname is very rare in France.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Daiville was born in 1205, in Kilburn, Yorkshire, England, his father, John de Daiville I, was 34 and his mother, Maud de Percy, was 38. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Mrs. Robert de Eiville. He died in May 1242, in Adlingfleet, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Daiville est né en 1205, à Kilburn, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John de Daiville I, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Maud de Percy, avait 38 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Mrs. Robert d’Eiville. Il est décédé en mai 1242, à Adlingfleet, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Daiville 1205 in Kilburn, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Daiville I 34 und seine Mutter Maud de Percy 38. Er hatte mit Mrs. Robert de Eiville mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb im Mai 1242 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Adlingfleet, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Daiville è nato il nel 1205 nel Kilburn, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, John de Daiville I, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Percy, aveva 38 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Mrs. Robert de Eiville. Morì nel maggio 1242, nel Adlingfleet, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Daivilleが1205年にイギリスヨークシュアイアキルブルンで生まれた時，父John de Daiville Iは34歳，母Maud de Percyは38歳であった。彼はMrs. Robert de Eivilleとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1242年5月にイギリスヨークシュアイアアドリングフリートで37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Daiville(이)가 1205년 영국 요르크실르 킬번에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Daiville I(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Percy(은)는 38세였다. 그는 Mrs. Robert de Eiville(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1242년 5월 영국 요르크실르 애들링플릿에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Daiville nasceu em 1205, em Kilburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Daiville I, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Percy, tinha 38 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Mrs. Robert de Eiville. Ele faleceu em maio de 1242, em Adlingfleet, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Daiville родился в 1205 г. в местности килбурн, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Daiville I было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Maud de Percy, 38. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Mrs. Robert de Eiville. Он умер май 1242 г. в местности адлингфлит, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 37 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Daiville nació en 1205, en Kilburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Daiville I, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Maud de Percy, tenía 38 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Mrs. Robert de Eiville. Murió en mayo de 1242, en Adlingfleet, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 37 años.
